_comment: Copy to data/lab_config.json ONLY on your own lab machine to enable local devnet status. Never on a server.
rpc_bind_warning: RPC must bind 127.0.0.1 or your Tailscale IP only — never 0.0.0.0 / public.
start_command: see ACAP_DESKTOP_NODE_DEVNET_LAB.md (Besu QBFT bring-up) — sourced from /opt/diamond/auction/blockchain
source_defs: auction blockchain/ QBFT genesis + static-nodes + docker-compose.single-host.yml
